backend: real (RealServiceProvider) against live colima profile 'default' (Running, 2 CPU / 2 GiB) + Lima
capture_method: app launched per-view via --open-tab <name>, window screenshotted, quit between views
note: Full-screen captures (the Kiro terminal/desktop are visible behind the app window).

screenshots.context: VM status (Running, profile default), real resources (2 cores, 2 GiB, 100 GiB, docker, v0.10.1), Smart Recommendations, SSH/SSH Config, Update/Template/Prune/Delete, embedded terminal running real `colima status`.
screenshots.notes: ResourceAdvisor FIXED: shows real allocation 2 CPU/2 GiB + 'No containers running' (idle) only — previously hardcoded 4/8 + fake peak + fake x86 count.

screenshots.context: Container list (table_containers) from real Docker API; create dialog, per-row start/stop/remove, detail tabs.
screenshots.notes: Empty list = 0 containers in default profile (matches `docker ps -a`).
Reflects the 8 real images in the default profile.

screenshots.context: Cluster enable/disable/reset, quick actions, Pods/Services/Deployments/Nodes/Events tabs.
screenshots.notes: Resource tables parse real `kubectl get ... -o json`; empty unless k8s enabled on the profile.
FIXED: shows real Lima VM 'default — Linux aarch64 4 CPU 4 GB' from `limactl list --json` — previously hardcoded fake dev-ubuntu/build-fedora/macos-ci/win11-test.
From real `colima list --json` — shows default, cdtest, desktop-e2e.

screenshots.context: Full VM config editor: CPU/memory/disk steppers, vmType/cpuType/mountType cards, arch/runtime/portForwarder/networkMode/modelRunner pickers, toggles, mounts/provision/env, Docker JSON, k8s, Save/Reset/Edit-YAML.
Model setup, model browser (Docker AI / HuggingFace / Ollama registries), run model.
screenshots.notes: KNOWN GAP: model catalog (MockK8sData.aiModels/registries) is hardcoded curated content. Real wiring = `colima model list/pull/run` (needs krunkit vmType + model runner). Documented, not silently faked.

screenshots.context: Activity monitor tree (VM/containers), sparklines, scoped stats, kill process.
screenshots.notes: Stats come from real containerStats; sparkline history accumulates live.

screenshots.context: Docker context picker, runtime name/version/socket, Update Runtime, command history.

screenshots.notes: KNOWN GAP: discussions (MockK8sData.discussions) are hardcoded content. Real wiring = GitHub Discussions API. Documented, not silently faked.
